description_long: This bicycle parking rack features a robust metal frame with five evenly spaced, curved loops designed to securely hold bicycles upright by their front or rear wheels. The structure is supported by a rectangular base with four circular mounting pads at the corners, likely for bolting the rack to the ground for stability. The loops are connected by horizontal bars at the top and bottom, providing additional rigidity and support. A white horizontal bar at the top may serve as a visual guide or a mounting point for signage. The overall finish is smooth and painted in a light yellow color, with the mounting pads and top bar in white. The open design allows for easy access from either side, accommodating multiple bicycles in a compact footprint.
description: A sturdy, light yellow metal bicycle rack with five curved loops and a rectangular base, featuring white mounting pads and a top bar. Designed for secure, upright bicycle parking in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the rack and the alignment of the five curved loops.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five parking slots and the white top bar spanning the width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the rack's depth and structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open base and the four white mounting pads at the corners.
